title: Creating with Sora Safely
summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.

title: Speaking of Voxtral
summary: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: Introducing Command R7B: Fast and efficient generative AI | Cohere Blog
summary: The smallest model in our R series delivers top-tier speed, efficiency, and quality to build powerful AI applications on commodity GPUs and edge devices.

title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >
summary: Products

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as a fast way to equip computers with its AI agent capabilities in about one minute.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution capabilities.

title: GLM-5 flagship model released
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent benchmarks such as SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model with strong 100B-class performance, tool-calling support, and 128K context length.

title: AutoGLM agent model announced
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution designed to address task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while enabling continual self-improvement.

title: GLM-PC base model CogAgent-9B open-sourced
summary: Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support broader agent ecosystem development. The model was trained from GLM-4V-9B for specialized agent tasks using screenshots as input.

title: Agent OpenDay update: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At Agent OpenDay, Zhipu AI shared new agent advances including AutoGLM handling more than 50-step workflows, cross-app task execution, and GLM-PC entering internal testing for computer-use scenarios.

title: Zhipu AI and Intel deepen AI ecosystem partnership
summary: Zhipu AI announced an expanded partnership with Intel, delivering on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX AI coding assistant for AI PCs as part of joint edge-cloud AI product efforts.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement tied to its foundation model organization.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview availability of the model for public evaluation or comparison.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks a formal model release in the company's model lineup.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement identifies it as a new model release from the company.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built through a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes improved reasoning capabilities for math tasks.

title: Seed1.8 Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement marks a new model launch in the Seed family.

title: Seedance 1.5 Pro Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 Pro, promoted with the message 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The launch suggests multimodal generation capabilities in the Seedance series.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as a medical model with evidence-grounded low hallucination
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations through evidence grounding. The page claims a hallucination benchmark rate as low as 2.6% and highlights a 70% cost reduction versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service organizations
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free Baichuan-M3-Plus API access to organizations serving medical professionals. The program is positioned as a way to accelerate safe and practical clinical AI deployment in China.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan4-Turbo as a newly released model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. It is described as offering over 10% better usability than Baichuan4, lower deployment and inference costs, and faster token response and streaming speed.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan4-Air as a newly released model featuring its MoE architecture for extreme cost performance and speed. The company says it is specially optimized for enterprise scenarios and offers very low inference pricing.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced for commercial use
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model focused on strong reasoning, low hallucination, and consultation capability. The page highlights 235 billion parameters and top open-source HealthBench performance.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced for commercial use
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. It is presented as a 32 billion parameter medical reasoning model with 32K context and leading open-source HealthBench results.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as the first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The model is described as deployable on a single RTX 4090 GPU, with 14 billion parameters, 20T medical-enhanced corpus, and 32K context.

title: Baichuan2-13B released as an open commercial multilingual model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan2-13B as an open-source, commercially usable multilingual large language model. The page states that compared with the previous 13B generation, it improved math, coding, safety, reasoning, and semantic understanding substantially.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical outcomes.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation of the company's enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and identified it as open-source. This is a named model announcement emphasizing performance and open availability.

2025-07-31 StepMesh: A Communication Library for Attention-FFN Disaggregation This article delves into the technical details and design choices of StepMesh, sharing our insights and considerations regarding the communication requirements for AF Separation systems.
2025-07-24 Step-Audio 2: Breakthrough in End-to-End Speech Modeling Technology Step-Audio 2 is an end-to-end multimodal large language model engineered for industrial applications

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
